introSection: Jet 400 was a steel roller coaster located on Fun Pier, now part of Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It had red track and white supports. It was destroyed by fire on November 24, 1984.
fullText: Jet 400 was a steel roller coaster located on Fun Pier, now part of Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It had red track and white supports. It was destroyed by fire on November 24, 1984.
